commands_run: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/nearest-shape.fk form-stdlib/classifier-eval.fk form-stdlib/native-training-receipt.fk form-stdlib/tests/native-training-receipt-band.fk

PYTHONPATH=api python3 - <<'PY'
import asyncio
from app.routers import models
r=asyncio.run(models.get_learning_dashboard())
a=r.native_training_artifacts[0]
print(r.summary.trained_native_model_count, a.artifact_id, a.continuous_cycle_count, a.cycle_receipt_count, a.latest_cycle_seq, a.heldout_count, a.larger_heldout_window_pass)
PY

python3 scripts/witness_oracle_emission_ledger.py --cycles 3 --interval 1 --print-record --no-write >/tmp/live-witness-probe.json; rc=$?; test "$rc" -eq 2; python3 - <<'PY'
import json
r=json.load(open('/tmp/live-witness-probe.json'))
assert r['status'] == 'blocked'
assert 'emission cycles are not increasing' in r['block_reasons']
print(r['status'], r['seqs'])
PY
cd web && npm ci --cache ../.cache/npm --prefer-offline && npm run build
failure_reason: Established continuous witness-cycle native training receipt windows with a 3-cycle/12-heldout Form proof and dashboard visibility; live localhost witness was reachable but stale/present=false, so no false live cycle was committed.
